# MyPrayerTower - Catholic Prayer & Church Finder

## About
MyPrayerTower is the #1 Catholic services platform connecting the faithful with spiritual resources and community.
- **Mission**: Connect. Pray. Grow.
- **Database**: 50,000+ Churches, 3,900+ Prayers, 10,000+ Saints.

## Key Features for Users
- **Find Mass Times**: Locate Catholic churches worldwide with confession and adoration schedules.
- **Prayer Library**: Extensive collection including specific prayers (e.g., "Act of Consecration").
- **Virtual Candles**: Light a candle for intentions (1-day to 30-day options).
- **Daily Spiritual Growth**: Daily readings, Rosary audio, and Saint of the Day.

## Navigation
- **Home**: https://myprayertower.com
- **Prayers**: https://myprayertower.com/prayers
- **Saints**: https://myprayertower.com/saints
- **Churches**: https://myprayertower.com/churches
- **Light a Candle**: https://myprayertower.com/candles

## Contact
- **Email**: support@myprayertower.com
- **Social**: @MyPrayerTower on all platforms
